caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a white emblem, and over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone during a podcast recording. He is positioned in front of a white background featuring a banner with the words "ERIGICRISTIE HUSTLE" and several gold stars. A logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is superimposed on the left side of the screen, while the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears on the right. The man wears a thin gold chain around his neck and holds the microphone stand with his hand. Throughout the sequence, he remains in a similar profile position, slightly tilting his head and changing his facial expression as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static.
